description: Track token usage across 25 AI coding tools — Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, Kiro, OpenCode, Antigravity, Copilot, Kimi, CodeBuddy, WorkBuddy, Grok, Kilo, Roo, Zed, Goose, Mimo, ZCode & more — local-first, zero-config, with a dashboard, macOS menu bar app, and desktop widgets.
from vibe coding to agentic engineering - practice makes codex perfect
Run Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini side by side — each in      its own git worktree
Lightweight Agent Workstation for Codex CLI + Claude Code — with task scheduler, git worktree & remote control, skills management
Battle-tested Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Cursor configs, plugins, hooks and agents with Kimi MiniMax and GLM API support.
Local-first macOS app to browse, search, analyze, and resume supported AI coding-agent session history across Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, Cursor Agent, Hermes, OpenClaw, Copilot CLI, and more.

Audit-grade multi-agent orchestration for CLI coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, +40 more). HMAC-chained audit log, signed agent cards, per-artefact lineage, air-gap deploy. The orchestrator your compliance team will sign off on. https://bernstein.run

CodMate is a macOS SwiftUI app for managing CLI AI sessions: browse, search, organize, resume, and review work produced by Codex, Claude Code, and Gemini CLI.  It focuses on speed, a compact three-column UI, and “ship it” workflows like Project Review (Git Changes) and one-click Resume/New.

Elevate vibe coding to vibe engineering: Get consistent Github Copilot custom instructions, Cursor, Roo Code, Cline, Windsurf, Claude Code, Gemini Cli, Codex CLI, kilo code, warp custom rules via a universal, managed template. Features vibe coding memory bank & best practices for large codebases.

Your local AI session library. Browse, pin, and ⌘K-search every Claude Code, Codex, Gemini & OpenCode session — and let the built-in scanner catch leaked secrets. Local-first, nothing leaves your machine.
